summary: Tested FlipSlab Engine Inventory Category feature - All backend (12/12) and frontend tests pass. Category field correctly filters inventory, stats show collection_count and for_sale_count, and import-from-scan endpoint works with duplicate protection.

issues: Stats card shows 'TOTAL CARDS: 2' but 'total_quantity: 2' - this is correct behavior as it shows quantity not count of unique cards. Consider renaming to 'TOTAL QUANTITY' for clarity.

passed_tests: POST /api/inventory with category='collection' - creates item with correct category - PASS
POST /api/inventory with category='for_sale' - creates item with correct category - PASS
POST /api/inventory without category - defaults to 'collection' - PASS
GET /api/inventory?category=collection - filters by collection category - PASS
GET /api/inventory?category=for_sale - filters by for_sale category - PASS
GET /api/inventory without category filter - returns all items - PASS
GET /api/inventory/stats - returns collection_count and for_sale_count - PASS
POST /api/inventory/from-scan/{id} - imports scanned card to collection - PASS
POST /api/inventory/from-scan/{id} with for_sale category - imports to for_sale - PASS
Frontend: Inventory page has 3 category tabs (All, Collection, For Sale) with counts - PASS
Frontend: Tab filtering works correctly - PASS
Frontend: Add Card modal has Collection and For Sale toggle buttons - PASS
Frontend: Category toggle styling changes on selection (blue for Collection, emerald for For Sale) - PASS
Frontend: Inventory items show COLLECTION badge (blue) - PASS
Frontend: AnalysisResult shows 'Add to Inventory' section with 'My Collection' and 'For Sale' buttons - PASS
Frontend: Import from scan creates item with correct category - PASS
Frontend: Sidebar navigation between Dashboard, Inventory, Flip Finder works correctly - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Category field implementation is correct with default='collection'
source_analysis_id field provides traceability for imported cards
Duplicate protection on from-scan endpoint works correctly
Frontend tabs correctly use counts from stats API
data-testid attributes present on all new interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Test items with 'TEST_' prefix created and cleaned up automatically. One card imported from scan to test from-scan endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory category feature fully tested. Items before category feature was added have category=null (displayed as COLLECTION in UI but don't filter correctly). Current state: 3 inventory items - 1 with category='collection' (imported from scan: '1999 SkyBox APEX Kobe Bryant #4'), 2 with category=null (legacy items). Stats API returns collection_count=1, for_sale_count=0. The AnalysisResult component has working 'Add to Inventory' buttons.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/inventory with category: PASS - Creates item with collection/for_sale category
backend_endpoints.POST /api/inventory/from-scan/{id}: PASS - Imports scanned card with category and duplicate protection

frontend_features.category_tabs: PASS - All, Collection, For Sale tabs with counts
frontend_features.tab_filtering: PASS - Clicking tabs filters inventory list
frontend_features.add_card_modal_category: PASS - Collection and For Sale toggle buttons
frontend_features.category_badge_display: PASS - Blue COLLECTION badge on items
frontend_features.add_to_inventory_buttons: PASS - My Collection and For Sale buttons in AnalysisResult
frontend_features.sidebar_navigation: PASS - Dashboard, Inventory, Flip Finder all work
